CHAMP-CHAMP_DEFENSIVE_STANCE.title: 防守姿态
CHAMP-CHAMP_DEFENSIVE_STANCE.description:
[gold]技术奖励[/gold]：获得[blue]{DefensiveSkill}[/blue]层[gold]反击[/gold]。
[gold]终结技[/gold]：获得[blue]{DefensiveFinisher}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
CHAMP-CHAMP_BERSERKER_STANCE.title: 战狂姿态
CHAMP-CHAMP_BERSERKER_STANCE.description:
[gold]技术奖励[/gold]：获得[blue]{BerserkerSkill}[/blue]层[gold]活力[/gold]。
[gold]终结技[/gold]：获得[blue]{BerserkerFinisher}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
CHAMP-CHAMP_NO_STANCE.title: 无姿态
CHAMP-CHAMP_ULTIMATE_STANCE.title: 终极姿态
CHAMP-CHAMP_ULTIMATE_STANCE.description:
[gold]技术奖励[/gold]：获得[blue]{BerserkerSkill}[/blue]层[gold]活力[/gold]和[blue]{DefensiveSkill}[/blue]层[gold]反击[/gold]。
[gold]终结技[/gold]：获得[blue]{BerserkerFinisher}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]和[blue]{DefensiveFinisher}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
